what: Extracted intent for FSC-2417: goal='Build a consolidated suitability dashboard on the FSC Client 360 page that computes and displays a single suitability score (0–100) from risk profile, investment objectives, and financial circumstances dimensions, enabling Wealth Advisers to make compliant advice recommendations under COBS 9.2 and Consumer Duty PS22/9.', persona='Wealth Adviser', fsc_objects=['Suitability__c', 'FinancialAccount', 'RiskProfile__c'], ac_present=True
why: Story Intent Agent parsed Jira description and acceptance criteria to produce structured intent consumed by INVEST Quality (Agent 2), FCA Classifier (Agent 3), and Data Need (Agent 7).

data.goal: Build a consolidated suitability dashboard on the FSC Client 360 page that computes and displays a single suitability score (0–100) from risk profile, investment objectives, and financial circumstances dimensions, enabling Wealth Advisers to make compliant advice recommendations under COBS 9.2 and Consumer Duty PS22/9.
fsc_components: Apex class SuitabilityScoreCalculator (triggered by Suitability__c update)
LWC suitability-dashboard (embedded on FSC Client 360 page)
data.story_summary: FSC-2417 introduces a consolidated suitability dashboard for Wealth Advisers on the FSC Client 360 page. A new Apex class (SuitabilityScoreCalculator) computes a single 0–100 suitability score from three weighted dimensions — risk profile (40%), investment objectives (35%), and financial circumstances (25%) — stored on FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c, and triggered by updates to Suitability__c records. A new LWC (suitability-dashboard) displays the score in real-time via a Platform Event (SuitabilityScoreUpdated__e), and enforces COBS 9.2 compliance warnings and stale-data alerts to ensure advisers always act on current, compliant assessments.
data.story_summary_jira: As a Wealth Manager, I want to view a client's consolidated suitability score combining risk profile, investment objectives, and financial circumstances, so that I can make compliant advice recommendations under COBS 9
